name: Garlic Cheese Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roll ingredients into a bread machine on dough setting and press start.
2. Remove the dough from the machine when finished.
3. Turn the dough out onto a floured countertop or cutting board.
4. Gently roll and stretch the dough into a 24-inch rope.
5. Grease an 8-inch pie pan.
6. Divide the dough into 18-24 pieces using a sharp knife.
7. Shape each piece into a ball and place it into the pie pan.
8. In a small bowl, combine the melted butter and crushed garlic.
9. Pour the mixture over the rolls.
10. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
11. Cover and let rise in a warm oven for 30-45 minutes until doubled.
12. Remove the rolls from the oven.
13. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
14. Place the rolls in the oven and bake for 10-15 minutes until golden on top.
